/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -g CMakeFiles/integrated_demo.dir/integrated_learning_demo.c.o -o integrated_demo  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bbrelin/nimcp/bin: /home/bbrelin/nimcp/bin/libnimcp.so.2.6.2 -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so -llz4 -ljansson -lcjson /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsodium.so
